category_sources: source_facts.description says xNVMe provides cross-platform libraries and tools for efficient I/O and low-level control; official docs title describes cross-platform libraries and tools for NVMe devices.
display_name_sources: official documentation title and source_facts.name use xNVMe/xnvme.
docs_sources: official xnvme.io site is the dedicated documentation site for xNVMe.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/xnvme/xnvme, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names libraries, tools, efficient I/O, and low-level control; official docs identify the target as NVMe devices.
